programme.desc: The horticultural expert visits spectacular gardens across the UK and meets the people who look after them, beginning with Great Dixter in Northiam Village in the Sussex High Weald. Head gardener Fergus Garrett talks about how he endeavours to use the grounds as a living laboratory of horticultural experimentation, and encourage biodiversity of plant and animal species

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Make a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: A couple decide to turn their backs on their suburban lives in London and move with their two children to the Malvern Hills on the Welsh border to open their own brewery. The couple purchase a four-bedroom house with a huge chicken shed that they think will be perfect for the brewery, but with no money coming in, they need to get the business up and running within six months

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary examining the history of the royal residence, which was the palace where Queen Victoria was born and raised. The building was converted into a heavy artillery base during the Second World War, when it also saw a German PoW camp established in the grounds

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Caravanning
programme.desc: Actors Colin Baker, Sherrie Hewson and Todd Carty, DJ Tony Blackburn and pop legend Sonia pack their showbiz bags and make tracks for stunning scenery and the trials and tribulations of a caravanning roadtrip, on a holiday adventure they will never forget

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in Cornwall as the worst storm of the season hits Tencreek holiday park and dozens of windblown campers seek shelter in the clubhouse. Meanwhile at Holiday Resort Unity in Somerset, a broken pump has closed the outdoor pool, leaving a long line of disgruntled guests

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: London property investor Ayo believes in giving back and empowering people through a mentoring scheme he set up, and he hopes the swap is a chance to find a family whom he can help. He is joined by his best friend Patrick, a successful estate agent, and they trade places with single mum Jodie and her two-year-old son, who live in a two-bedroom rented house in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, and have just £53 a week to spend on everything from groceries to transport and clothes

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: New Saydo Park arrivals Carole and Phyllis already love life in Spain but they want to experience more of the community spirit, so they sign up for fellow resident Margaret's mystery tour. Where will it take them? Tree surgeon Rocky faces danger on a daily basis as he tends to the high branches of the Costa del Sol, while young magician Dean faces the first night of a residency at the Chamber of Secrets theatre

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 80s Songs
programme.desc: Simon Bates narrates this look at the music of 1983, featuring interviews with Toyah Willcox, Paul Gambaccini, Cheryl Baker, Carol Decker, Jenny Powell and other famous faces. Among the featured tracks are Eurythmics' Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This), New Order's Blue Monday, and Bad Boys by Wham!

programme.title: Greatest Ever Celebrity Wind Ups
programme.desc: Joe Pasquale revisits another selection of memorable celebrity pranks, including the time Justin Bieber almost reduced Taylor Swift to tears by tricking her into thinking she has set a boat on fire and ruined a wedding in the process. Michael Buble dons prosthetic make-up and a thick South African accent as he goes undercover in a London department store, and Luke Skywalker himself, Mark Hamill, gets dressed up in Stormtrooper regalia to meet members of the public incognito

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Ultimate Celeb Power Couples
programme.desc: Celebrating the world's biggest celebrity couples of 2016, with a definitive countdown based on the stars' reported wealth, media impact and political muscle. Featuring interviews and insiders, the programme explores what makes a successful celebrity partnership, before revealing which duo will be crowned Ultimate Celebrity Power Couple 2016

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Nick's Quest
programme.desc: Naturalist Nick Baker searches for the world's most dangerous animals. He begins with a trip to the remote Llanos region of Venezuela in the hope of encountering the anaconda, one of nature's largest snakes

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton tackle a cottage in Kirk Merrington, Co Durham, that has been on the market for eight months. The property is full of items that remind the owner of her late husband, and interior design expert Ann declares that they are the main problem as no prospective buyers can imagine making the place their own

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora! (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama recounting the bombing of Pearl Harbour from both the Japanese and American perspectives, reconstructing the events leading up to the devastating attack on the US naval base in 1941. Starring Martin Balsam, So Yamamura, Joseph Cotten, James Whitmore and Jason Robards

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen (2003)
programme.desc: Fearless hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a host of other characters from Victorian literature - including Captain Nemo, the Invisible Man, Tom Sawyer and Dr Jekyll - to put a stop to the nefarious Fantom's evil plot to bring about a world war. Fantasy adventure, based on Alan Moore's comic-book series, starring Sean Connery in his final screen role, Shane West, Stuart Townsend, Richard Roxburgh, Peta Wilson and Tony Curran

programme.title: The Shape of Water (2017)
programme.desc: Elisa Esposito is a mute singleton who lives above a cinema. Although friends with Giles, a neighbouring artist, she lives a lonely existence. While he has designs on the cafe worker nearby, Elisa cleans up at top-secret government lab, a bus ride away in Baltimore, Maryland. One day in 1962, she makes a life-changing discovery when Elisa finds an amphibious humanoid creature who is being held captive, and they embark on an extraordinary relationship. Guillermo del Toro's Oscar and Bafta-winning fantasy, starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Octavia Spencer and Doug Jones

programme.title: Crimson Peak (2015)
programme.desc: An aspiring writer marries a British aristocrat, and goes to live with him and his sister in their sinister ancestral home. She is tormented by ghostly apparitions and seeks to uncover the terrifying secrets in the family's past. Guillermo del Toro's gothic horror, starring Mia Wasikowska, Tom Hiddleston and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Stonehearst Asylum (2014)
programme.desc: A new apprentice at a lunatic asylum is intrigued by the unusual methods of the doctor in charge. He realises too late that the doctor is actually a patient who has taken over with the intent of establishing his own form of society - a plan that leads to chaos. Gothic horror based on Edgar Allen Poe's short story Eliza Graves, starring Kate Beckinsale, Jim Sturgess, David Thewlis and Michael Caine

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie (2000)
programme.desc: The lucky little tots embark on a trip to a French theme park - but while the rest of the gang are intent on enjoying themselves, Chuckie is distracted by his wish for a new mum. He sets his sights on the owner of the amusement park as a prospective partner for his single dad. Animated adventure, with the voices of Christine Cavanaugh, Elizabeth Daily, Cheryl Chase, Kath Soucie and Susan Sarandon

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: Megamind (2010)
programme.desc: An evil genius finally succeeds in killing the superhero who has foiled his every evil scheme, but finds life without an enemy boring. To fill the gap, he transforms an ordinary man into a worthy adversary - but when his creation turns evil, it falls to the villain to save the world. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Ferrell, Tina Fey and Brad Pitt

programme.title: WarGames (1983)
programme.desc: A teenager hacks into a top-secret military supercomputer, which challenges him to what he thinks is a game. However, the machine has complete control of the US nuclear arsenal, and the youngster's actions are unwittingly pushing the world to the brink of war. Thriller, starring Matthew Broderick, Ally Sheedy, Dabney Coleman and John Wood

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: A chain of bizarre and deadly incidents in several countries leads scientists to the conclusion that the Earth's core has stopped spinning. As chaos erupts around the world, experts hatch a plan to halt the destruction and save the human race - but it involves venturing deep below the planet's surface to detonate a nuclear bomb. Sci-fi thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank, Stanley Tucci and DJ Qualls

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (2017)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to be his bodyguard as he has had death threats made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, directed by and starring Kenneth Branagh, with Daisy Ridley, Derek Jacobi and Johnny Depp

programme.title: Don't Breathe (2016)
programme.desc: Three thieves break into the house of a blind Gulf War veteran, who is not as helpless as he seems and is also harbouring a dark secret. Horror, starring Stephen Lang, Jane Levy and Dylan Minnette

programme.title: The Quiet Ones (2014)
programme.desc: An academic scientist recruits a group of Oxford students for a strange experiment, performing a series of tests on a woman in the hope of tapping into her apparent psychic abilities and deliberately manifesting a poltergeist. However, they soon find they are unable to control the dark forces they unleash. Horror, starring Jared Harris and Sam Claflin

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: Cutthroat Island (1995)
programme.desc: A tough female pirate enlists the help of an educated slave in finding the three parts of a map leading to buried treasure. However, one of the pieces is in the hands of her cruel uncle, and she also has to find the loot before her crew mutinies or the British Navy catches up with her. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Geena Davis, Matthew Modine, Frank Langella and Maury Chaykin

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: God's Own Country (2017)
programme.desc: Young Yorkshire farmer Johnny Saxby numbs his frustrations with casual sex and alcohol. However, his life changes when he falls for a Romanian migrant worker during lambing season. Writer/director Francis Lee's drama, starring Josh O'Connor, Alec Secareanu and Gemma Jones

programme.title: Border (2018)
programme.desc: A customs officer who can smell fear develops an unusual attraction to a strange traveller while aiding a police investigation that will call into question her entire existence. Crime drama, starring Eva Melander, Eero Milonoff and Jörgen Thorsson. In Swedish

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a year's worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante, and learns that she is suffering from post-natal depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side as she works through it. Meanwhile, the kids make an effort to assist their parents by baby-proofing the house. Comedy, starring Tracee Ellis Ross

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people in the past. Meanwhile, Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker's girlfriend Vanessa makes Ben's life miserable when she gets the assistant manager job at his bar, and tries to impose new hours and uniforms. However, he seizes an opportunity to get back at her by ruining a large event she is planning. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's feelings are hurt when Riley wants to talk to Danny and not him about her bar exam woes, but she finally tells him that she has taken the test three times without passing. Determined to support his friend, Ben tries to convince her not to give up on her dreams of becoming a lawyer. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica forget to buy Beverly a Mother's Day gift and make last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead. Understandably hurt, Beverly gets her revenge by cashing in every coupon they have made in one go. Adam yearns to go to a summer camp for junior astronauts and accuses his father of crushing his dreams when he isn't keen to give permission

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's favourite shirt is hated by both his mother Beverly and his girlfriend Lainey, so they hatch a plan together to destroy it. However, once the shirt goes missing, Barry asks Adam and Erica to investigate. Murray decides to tear down the family tree house, leaving Adam distraught

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. Holt and Jeffords try to think up some strategies to make the team more efficient. Featuring a guest appearance by Adam Sandler

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Meanwhile, a terrified Sheldon enlists his friends' help when a bird flies into his apartment, but his behaviour soon leaves them exasperated. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical production, but when he finds out that Adam and Lainey have been cast in roles that require them to kiss, he tries to sabotage it by joining the stage crew. Meanwhile, substitute teacher Beverly causes chaos in Erica's class. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry in a game of basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the school gym. Beverly tries to throw a 'surprise' party for Murray's 50th birthday, despite his objections to the idea

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples face another critical point in their relationship, the Brides' Homestays, with some couples stumbling when meeting friends, family and their partner's expectations

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Adam's prank goes wrong, and Wes does everything he can to avoid him. A one-day charter feels like an eternity when a group of eccentric Texans board Sirocco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is asked to create a message on the off-chance a Nasa mission discovers alien life, and the guys fight over what he should do. Meanwhile, Penny contemplates returning to acting. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)
programme.desc: The nomadic vigilante tries to save an army major who has been framed for murder and treason. Jack Reacher discovers that Turner has been targeted by a secret government conspiracy, and together they go on the run to expose the truth. Director Edward Zwick's blockbusting action thriller sequel based on Lee Child's novel, starring Tom Cruise, Cobie Smulders, Danika Yarosh and Aldis Hodge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Penny's former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys have fun at the expense of Penny's boyfriend Zack, but later try to make amends by enlisting his help with the New Year's costume competition at the comic-book store. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts as Richard from Darlington, a 27-year-old singer in a Take That tribute band, takes part in the dating show. Next is 50-year-old David, an audiologist from Maidstone. A divorcee after 24 years of marriage, he has a brand new lease of life and is looking for an adventurous lady to share it with. Will he find a kindred spirit behind one of the coloured pods?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated TV viewers share their critiques from April 2017, considering Line of Duty, Mary Berry's Easter Feast, Saturday Night Takeaway, University Challenge, Big Little Lies, The Toilet: An Unspoken History, The Dog with an IQ of 102, and the News

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: This week Greg Davies and assistant Alex Horne engage in some role-play to assess the success of a throwing task, and Noel Fielding has a sliding session

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Twin sisters visit the restaurant, each looking for their Prince Charming - but while Francesca appears to be smitten by former boarding school pupil Hugo, Claudia has been hurt too many times before, and her guard is up with rapper Marcus. Maths teacher and human calculator Ian is looking for someone to help him get over his awkwardness, and hopes radiographer Rachel will be the one, while firefighter Marc meets Marilyn Monroe lookalike Elle - will it be a case of some like it hot? Do gentlemen definitely prefer blondes? Or will they turn out to be misfits?

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's former Sunrise Bay producers show up with big news, while Alexis binge-watches old episodes of the soap

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is asked to create a message on the off-chance a Nasa mission discovers alien life, and the guys fight over what he should do. Meanwhile, Penny contemplates returning to acting. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante, and learns that she is suffering from post-natal depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side as she works through it. Meanwhile, the kids make an effort to assist their parents by baby-proofing the house. Comedy, starring Tracee Ellis Ross

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmin's dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Christina and Katie Bailey have two toddler girls who have a hard time with sharing. One child picked Katie as their favourite mum, so Jo Frost comes to their assistance

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik (Blossom) makes her first appearance on the show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howard's new robotic arm creates problems

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to extend his lifespan, concerned he will not be around long enough for his consciousness to be downloaded into a robot body, and the friends encounter Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak (guest starring as himself) at the Cheesecake Factory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon breaks up with Amy and turns to cats in his search for an alternative to human companionship. However, when he starts to bulk-buy pets, Leonard decides enough is enough and calls for reinforcements to help bring his friend back to his senses. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret from Howard's past comes to light as he tries to win back Bernadette, while Sheldon and Raj engage in a battle of wills when they have to work in the same office. Guest starring Katee Sackhoff and George Takei

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their father's eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldn't replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: MC Dizzee Rascal, radio DJ Nick Grimshaw, psychologist Philippa Perry and actor-writer Reece Shearsmith brave the baking tent in the name of charity. All that stands between them and the title of Star Baker are three challenges - vegetable slices, a 'right royal' technical and a biscuit selfie depicting themselves at work. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts, while Matt Lucas shouts out how much time is remaining in a silly voice

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard questions his engineering abilities when he and Sheldon can't get a toy drone to fly. A cancelled flight almost stops Leonard from giving the commencement address at his former high school, while Raj pits his parents against each other when his father cuts him off financially

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: There is a clash of personalities when Sheldon and Leonard's mothers finally meet, while Howard finally decides to do his fair share of the housework - but not without a little help from his friends. Guest starring Christine Baranski and Laurie Metcalf

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsie and Phemelo, Emily Atack and Kate Robbins, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, and Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv critique the week's TV. Shows including including American Pie, The Graham Norton Show, Love Island, Natural World - Walrus: Two Tonne Tusker, Killing Eve, Blind Date, Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters, and The Family Brain Game come under their gaze. First shown in June 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on My Next Guest Needs No Introduction with David Letterman and Kim Kardashian, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, the Good Morning Britain interview with Nigel Farage, Strictly Come Dancing, Don't Rock the Boat, The Undoing and BBC News coverage of Covid-19, the English lockdown and the death of Sean Connery

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated viewers the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Mary and Marina, and Amira and Iqra look back on the year's biggest and best shows, including Strictly Come Dancing, Countdown, This Morning, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, CBeebies Bedtime Stories, The Undoing, First Dates, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Elephant, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown and Naked Attraction

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons meet up for a blind date, including former boarding school pupil Hugo, who is back for a second shot at love. Trainee opera singer Olympia takes centre stage for his encore performance - but will she hit all the right notes to win him over? Other hopefuls include ex-Playboy bunny Jacqui, who is paired up with ex-stripper Ricky, and sensitive soul Steven, who is hoping to find someone who will get along with the most important lady in his life - his nan. Will keen knitter Anna fit the bill?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne supervises the tasks as Mel Giedroyc's good nature is pushed to its limits, Joe Lycett shows no mercy to a camel, and Hugh Dennis gets a sleeping bag challenge

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmin's dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Warren is desperate to prove his innocence when someone tries to frame him for a crime he did not commit, while Summer decides to change tactics by befriending Sienna

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsay's visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurant's failings

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's sister Priya visits the gang, causing tension when Leonard tries to cover up the fling he once had with her. After discovering his friend's secret, Sheldon struggles to keep quiet, leading the guys to reveal information they have all been keeping from one another

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard vows to be more self-assured around women, believing his problem attracting a girlfriend stems from a lack of confidence. An FBI agent interviews the gang to assess Howard's suitability for a team working on a new surveillance satellite. Guest starring Eliza Dushku

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldon's old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howard's girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Penny's former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys have fun at the expense of Penny's boyfriend Zack, but later try to make amends by enlisting his help with the New Year's costume competition at the comic-book store. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Gogglesprogs
programme.desc: Young TV viewers give their honest, inimitable and hilarious take on This Morning and Doctor Who, and sing along to The Sound of Music

programme.title: Teen First Dates
programme.desc: A-level student Genevieve is desperate to make a good impression on her first-ever date, while Sonny is eager to meet a girl who shares his passion for all things 1970s

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: There's discord between contestants Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall as rows erupt over facial hair and Jamali's driving skills. Taskmaster Greg Davies is likely pleased that his usual divide-and-conquer tactics are seemingly paying early dividends, as he watches Mike vaulting a high fence, Sarah wearing shoes on her knees, Charlotte grappling with static electricity and Lee struggling to see a balloon and a ghost. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on TV from the first week of September 2017, featuring The Great British Bake Off, Doctor Foster, The X Factor, The Crystal Maze, Mountain: Life at the Extreme, Cheap Cheap Cheap and the news

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during October 2017, including Strictly Come Dancing, The X Factor, Britain by Bike with Larry and George Lamb, Gordon Ramsay on Cocaine and Hillary Clinton's appearance on The One Show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's ingenious idea for a new smartphone app puts pressure on his friendship with Sheldon, who vies with him for control of the project. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Warren is desperate to prove his innocence when someone tries to frame him for a crime he did not commit, while Summer decides to change tactics by befriending Sienna

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enlists the help of paper-cutting expert Poppy Chancellor to make personalised wedding invitations for a couple about to tie the knot. Plus, the inventive presenter creates a craft collage to celebrate the arrival of a newborn baby

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Following a tough couple of years, brother and sister Tony and Lyn have decided to relocate permanently to the paradise island of Antigua. With such a big move on the cards, Scarlette Douglas steps up to the challenge and shows them five incredible properties for their budget of £350,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Northamptonshire in search of more upcycling prospects. Simon finds some night vision goggles and an antique snooker table that's seen better days, while Henry chooses an enormous US army truck as one of his picks

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting a Norman castle, restoring a Fiat 500 and making a table from part of Southend pier

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The start of the wedding season sees Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree at their busiest, with events booked all through the summer, but there is still time to make improvements. Angel has her sights set on transforming the gravelled area at the front of the chateau into a thing of beauty and the whole family take a trip to Monet's stunning house and garden, where a plan for the chateau's very own water lily patch is hatched

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton visits south London, where self-building duo Caroline and Chris hope to deliver an urban marvel on a tight plot, and a tighter budget. Chris is an architect, so you'd think achieving perfection on time and on budget should come as second nature. However, a string of budget-busting gremlins suggests that this build has other ideas. Plus, just when they think things can't get any more complicated, life throws them a curveball which racks the pressure even higher

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Richard III in Middleham, North Yorkshire, a pub run by Ken Ward and his wife Sharon, who become suspicious when one couple check out before breakfast. The village is known for its horse racing links, but one of the competitors, Matt Wilson, has a fear of horses, and another couple are concerned at staying above a noisy pub

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Court House Unique Boutique B&B in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, where hosts Keith and Lisa Shearin hope to impress. On arrival, Ken and Sharon are blown away by their honeymoon suite and the seemingly low price. Suspicions over price fixing drive Matt and Paul to the internet to verify the room rate, where they discover an anomaly, and despite Keith's best efforts at breakfast, Jo and Louis dismiss it as being too fancy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Castley Camp in Otley, West Yorkshire, for the third day of the contest, owned by single mum Jo Stevenson and her son Louis. Some of the guests are horrified by stains on their bedding and dust in their room, while an afternoon boot camp fitness session reveals Keith's competitive side. At feedback, Jo is left fuming over the comments about cleanliness and breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at the Lion & Swan in Congleton, Cheshire, run by owner Paul Whyle and manager Matt Wilson. A dirty bathroom and a waterbed cause upset, while some guests are still fuming about previous negative feedback. However, the worst is left for breakfast, when Sharon reveals she has discovered their rooms online at a higher price than they were told, upsetting Keith and Lisa and leaving the hosts determined to clear their names

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. First up are Ken and Sharon from the Richard III, who want to learn more about what's been causing Jo and Louis to lose sleep. Next, Keith and Lisa from the Court House Unique Boutique B&B want to challenge Matt about the allegations of price fixing and vehemently fight their corner. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Lancashire where Simon finds a 1980s glass cabinet he wants to turn into a modern grandfather clock. Henry picks up a drum kit and decides to relive his youth

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: As the festive season approaches at Chester Zoo, Bactrian camels Becky and Mei-Li are about to be given a seasonal surprise in the shape of Sparky, a young addition to the herd. In the zoo's aquarium, Clerk and Doris, long-term mascara barb fish partners, welcome three new females in their tank. Meanwhile, red pandas Nima and Koda are going through a difficult time in their relationship

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel are warming up for one of the year's biggest events - Angel's parents' 50th wedding anniversary, which involves inviting more than 100 people to a huge party. There's a bespoke menu to plan and prepare, so Dick has called in the cavalry, with his son James arriving from Cornwall. Together with some help from Arthur, the Strawbridge boys have their work cut out as they create dishes they hope will strike a chord with everyone

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Brighton couple Daren Howarth and Adi Nortje, who want to build an earth-sheltered home from recycled materials, based on ideas pioneered in New Mexico in the 1970s. However, land prices and planning laws have forced the pair out of England and into Brittany. To keep costs down, Daren and Adi enlist the help of unskilled volunteers to work on the house, in exchange for teaching them the construction techniques

programme.title: Deutschland 89
programme.desc: When Martin wakes up in Frankfurt, he finds himself in the middle of preparations for a major terrorist attack and realises that Max and Nicole are in danger. He encounters his aunt Lenora when he desperately tries to prevent the attack's success. Meanwhile, Fuchs and Dietrich prepare to leave East Germany for good. Drama, starring Jonas Nay and Maria Schrader. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. He is placed in an induced coma and CT scans reveal Sam has bruising to his lungs, a ruptured kidney, a broken thigh bone and a fractured spine. The priority of the medics is is to stop his internal bleeding, while Sam's parents are rushed to the hospital by police. Meanwhile, seven-year-old Raheem arrives in A&E with his dad Dennis after cutting his wrist while playing at home, and 59-year-old Therese turns up with a painful lump on her finger

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Surgeons must plan their next move carefully when Daisy, a 22-month-old girl, arrives at St George's Hospital by air ambulance after being kicked in the head by a horse at her family's stables. Meanwhile, 54-year-old Mike, who has a form of medication-resistant epilepsy, arrives in minors with a bandage around his jaw after falling face-first onto the pavement. Plus, 100-year-old Florence, who was diagnosed with dementia three years earlier, and her daughter Frances arrive at the hospital when the former suffers what appears to be a stroke

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Key striker Father Jack drinks himself into oblivion just as the Craggy Island clerics are about to play a vital five-a-side football match against their Rugged Island rivals, led by devious Dick Byrne. Dermot Morgan stars

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Cheating in the football match backfires on Ted, prompting his Rugged Island rivals to think up a devilish forfeit - and leaving the priest trying to contrive a way of kicking Bishop Brennan's backside and getting away with it. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. He is placed in an induced coma and CT scans reveal Sam has bruising to his lungs, a ruptured kidney, a broken thigh bone and a fractured spine. The priority of the medics is is to stop his internal bleeding, while Sam's parents are rushed to the hospital by police. Meanwhile, seven-year-old Raheem arrives in A&E with his dad Dennis after cutting his wrist while playing at home, and 59-year-old Therese turns up with a painful lump on her finger

programme.desc: Surgeons must plan their next move carefully when Daisy, a 22-month-old girl, arrives at St George's Hospital by air ambulance after being kicked in the head by a horse at her family's stables. Meanwhile, 54-year-old Mike, who has a form of medication-resistant epilepsy, arrives in minors with a bandage around his jaw after falling face-first onto the pavement. Plus, 100-year-old Florence, who was diagnosed with dementia three years earlier, and her daughter Frances arrive at the hospital when the former suffers what appears to be a stroke

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Key striker Father Jack drinks himself into oblivion just as the Craggy Island clerics are about to play a vital five-a-side football match against their Rugged Island rivals, led by devious Dick Byrne. Dermot Morgan stars

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Spain to find out how much orange goes into squash. Matt Tebbutt tries to solve the age-old mystery of how to get ketchup out of the bottle smoothly, while Kate Quilton checks Marmite's TV advert claims that a DNA test can predict whether people are more likely to love it or hate it

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Alan and Carol, who want to spend their retirement on Fuerteventura in the Canary Islands, showing them five properties for their budget of £90,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Vinita and Baljinder, whose dream of buying a holiday home in Florida began 25 years ago, showing them a selection of properties for their £110,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Johnny Amobi and his 14-year-old son search for a property on the island of Gran Canaria, with the support of his best friend, Deniece

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with two couples they met in 2016, Tom and Timna, and Kirsty and Rich, who were both looking for new homes in York. Tom and Timna were expecting their first child and needed more space for their family, while Kirsty and Rich decided to move to York from London to be closer to family. Did either couple find what they were looking for?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sports fanatic James Cox hosts the first of the week's dinner parties in Northampton, and he is confident that his French-Italian menu will bag him the £1,000 prize. However, some of his guests - Barb Wiles, Donna Harris, Duncan Fielding and Caroline Nash - are left confused by his Vichyssoise soup starter, and the tiramisu causes one of them to choke

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Donna Harris hosts the second dinner party in Northampton, and hopes that three courses of pure comfort-food will be enough to secure the £1,000 prize. Donna spends almost as much time fixing her make-up as she does preparing the meal, and when guests Duncan Fielding and Caroline Nash discover a secret stash of football shirts, they realise there is more to their hostess than meets the eye

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time actress Caroline Nash is the host on day three of the competition in Northampton, and she hopes that a menu based on her travels will dazzle her guests. However, the night gets off to a shaky start as Donna Harris finds a hair on the side of her goat's cheese salad, while businessman Duncan Fielding seems more interested in goats themselves than the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party-loving Barb Wiles hosts the fourth dinner party in the Northampton area, and hopes her Australian-themed menu will wow her guests and win her the £1,000 prize. However, the competitors are unnerved by her interest in extraterrestrials while snooping around her bedroom, and things go from bad to worse when a seafood starter and undercooked chicken result in tears at the dinner table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Attention-loving businessman and keen cricketer Duncan Fielding takes centre stage in hosting the final dinner party from Northampton. He creates a menu based on the story of his life - which is full of surprises and full of spice - but it proves a challenge for three of his guests, who like their food mild. His main feature is a chicken and reindeer curry, and the table is impressed to discover that he runs a community pub from the bottom of his garden

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon White and Shirley Boyle, owners of the Old Hall Country House in Madeley, Cheshire, host the week's first round of the B&B competition. The guests are impressed by the 16th-century building, and are taken tap-dancing and to a private fine-dining restaurant, but one of them is dissatisfied with her bedroom's layout and the garnish on her eggs at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eileen Finn invites her fellow contestants to the four-star Thornley House in Allendale, Northumberland, for the second round of the contest, but struggles to follow the impressive first event. The hostess's pet cats are not to all of her guests' liking, and with activities including a tour of a feline cemetery, the theme for the stay is made abundantly clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jessica and Adrian Rashleigh are the third hosts, at their three-bedroom establishment Chy Conyn in St Ives, Cornwall. For the activity they arrange a magical mystery camper van tour of the local sights. Some of the guests struggle with the small breakfast room but the food is a success, and Eileen Finn demonstrates her karate skills on the men

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the Cavendish in Bournemouth, run by Tim and Karen Sturgess. On arrival, the competitors are impressed by the 'pink palace', but things go downhill when a bed is broken and one couple are allocated a room next to the front door. However, Eileen is delighted by the feline memorabilia in her room and the group enjoys a spot of indoor paint-balling and an open-top bus tour of the resort

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Simon White of Old Hall Country House is surprised by an overpayment and Eileen Finn from the four-star Thornley receives tough criticism, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part two of two. Sheila Hancock and Gyles Brandreth explore the Staffordshire and Worcestershire Canal. They uncover the history of Stourport, which only came into being after the canal was built there, which is unique for a British town. They explore the history of carpet manufacturing in Kidderminster and meet 84-year-old Audrey, who operated a daunting power loom for much of her working life. Gyles also dons a panto costume in Stourbridge to learn more about the local legend of Dick Whittington. When the duo reach Wolverhampton, they get a taste of the Desi pub, a modern institution in the Black Country that combines Punjabi food with British booze

programme.title: Walking with Elephants
programme.desc: Explorer, conservationist, author and presenter Levison Wood treks alongside hundreds of elephants on their annual migration across Botswana. He gets up close and personal for the first time with a group of orphans and takes part in an ancient ceremony, before setting off into the bush in search of a herd to follow. Following potentially dangerous encounters with a buffalo and a pride of lions, Lev finds his first herd, but is forced to leave them alone when one threatens to charge

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-one-year-old Cyril is airlifted to hospital after a car crash which required him to be cut from his car. Meanwhile, the medical team treat 57-year-old Caroline, who arrives at St George's with chest pains, plus five-year-old Roman has a pencil stuck in his ear

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow Lawrence, 26, who is rushed to St George's after being hit by a car while crossing the road on a night out in Eastbourne. Meanwhile, 53-year-old Katrina is brought to A&E after having difficulty breathing and experiencing chest pains that could indicate a heart attack

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Mrs Doyle wins a competition to meet a famous singer, and discreetly invites him round for tea - but the secret slips out, and soon the house is besieged by hordes of adoring pensioners. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Pauline McLynn

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A smooth-talking priest offers Ted a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to leave Craggy Island and run his own parish in Beverly Hills, but first he has to tell Jack, Dougal and Mrs Doyle that they are not invited. Final episode of the clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, with Tommy Tiernan, Jeff Harding and a cameo appearance by music star Brian Eno

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Stephen Mangan teaming up against Noel Fielding and Fay Ripley. The Brett Domino Trio are in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-one-year-old Cyril is airlifted to hospital after a car crash which required him to be cut from his car. Meanwhile, the medical team treat 57-year-old Caroline, who arrives at St George's with chest pains, plus five-year-old Roman has a pencil stuck in his ear

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Cheating in the football match backfires on Ted, prompting his Rugged Island rivals to think up a devilish forfeit - and leaving the priest trying to contrive a way of kicking Bishop Brennan's backside and getting away with it. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a man planning to build Margate's first Victorian bathing machine in more than 100 years, and a coma survivor who proves he has a sense of humour by transforming a hearse into a family camper van. The presenter also visits a woman who has turned her narrowboat home into a floating bookshop, and in Germany he sees a lifeguard tower straight out of a 1950s sci-fi comic

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George meets Amin and Amifa, whose 1920s house in Bellingham, south east London, is not just ugly - the property's DIY extension added by former owners has been condemned. The makeshift kitchen is an accident waiting to happen. The living room is dark and dingy and misaligned windows are not doing anything for its kerb appeal. Enter architect Carl Turner, who has a modest budget of £80,000 to transform this monstrosity. Can he create a contemporary, spacious and adaptable home for this rapidly growing family?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: A young couple ask George to help make sense of their poorly planned Victorian terrace, which currently means they have to go through the kitchen to get to the only bathroom in the house. They have big ideas, but without a budget to match it will prove to be a challenge. The architect also visits a mother in the Cotswolds who plans to knock together two tiny Grade II listed cottages to create a cosy family home. This will leave her with two kitchens, two sitting rooms and even two staircases. Can George come up with a plan to make the most of this arrangement?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First aid manager Jacqui hosts the first dinner party in Perth, where she plans to impress her guests, optometric consultant Daniel, cabinet-maker Craig, administrator Lorea and procurement officer Jenna with her hearty cuisine, including a sticky toffee pudding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Daniel hosts the second dinner party in Perth, and hopes to impress his fellow contestants with a twist on the traditional Scottish menu - serving spaghetti hagginaise for his main and soft-drink flavoured ice-cream for dessert. But with outspoken guest Jenna admitting her dislike for the host, the attention is diverted away from the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: For the third party from Perth, Lorea is on a mission to showcase the culinary delights of her native home in northern Spain, and her fiesta commences with a pink cocktail and an exotic quartet flown over from the Basque country especially to impress. She reveals that she used to model in the nude, which perplexes her guests, and there are tensions at bay between Daniel and Jenna, which threaten to spoil the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Procurement officer Jenna hosts the fourth night of the competition in Perth, and tries to deliver the perfect evening. However, she struggles to hide her feelings toward aspiring actor Daniel after they have bickered all week, despite first aid manager Jacqui's attempts at reconciliation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day in Perth, and Kiwi Craig's turn to throw a dinner party before the winner is named. He hopes that his land and sea menu of prime lobster and wild boar will see him score highly, but hadn't counted on Jenna and Craig's tiara quarrel from the night before raging on into his evening. The host tries his best to calm the couple, but tensions mount to the point where cutlery is slammed down and one guest storms out

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mark and Kathy Domaille, owners of Godshill Park Farm on the Isle of Wight, host the week's first round of the B&B competition and invite their guests to take part in clay pigeon shooting. However, dust behind bath taps, a lack of coat-hangers and a breakfast that does not meet expectations take the shine off their stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Teresa and Clive, owners of the Butterfly Guest House in Porthcawl, south Wales, host the next round of the competition, but their status as beginners is confirmed when one couple find hairs in the bathroom. Another pair are shocked to discover there is no view of the sea from their window, but things liven up when the guests go bowling and attend a surprise karaoke party

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Kalpana and Joseph's four-star townhouse in Blackpool, the Address. Cumbrian farmers Ruth and Mike are unhappy their room overlooks a car park and security light, and a trip to the Pleasure Beach results in Teresa calling Mark and Kathy a miserable couple

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competitors head to Cumbria to visit Mike and Ruth's four-star gold-rated Crake Trees Manor. Two of the guests are looking forward to their stay in the plush building, until they discover they have been allocated outdoor accommodation without electricity, water or a toilet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Mark and Kathy of Godshill Park Farm receive some underpayments, and accusations of game-playing abound before the week's winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions
programme.desc: The dinner party challenge visits Doncaster, South Yorkshire, where four contestants compete for the £1,000 prize. Mini-supermarket owner Harinder Khela hosts the first dinner party. Determined to impress with his enormous Indian feast, his hopes for the perfect evening are thwarted by Andrew Lloyd

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions
programme.desc: The dinner party challenge visits Doncaster, South Yorkshire, where four contestants compete for the £1,000 prize. Arguments break out during image consultant Alison Tinsley's evening, with ladette Sarah Wells telling off Andrew Lloyd

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions
programme.desc: In Doncaster, South Yorkshire, Sarah Wells hosts the third dinner party in a bid to win the £1,000 prize, but she has some making up to do for her behaviour in the last round

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Extra Portions
programme.desc: Andrew Lloyd host the final party in Doncaster, South Yorkshire, and welcomes his guests to his home with a ten-foot poster of himself. He also has plans to perform a rap for them

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Nisha Katona explores the historic city of Campobasso, where she learns about knitted cheese and samples pork and hot spices with smoked mash potato with a local chef

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Nathan and Amye as they build a giant cathedral-like property modelled on Dutch barn style houses, but with a contemporary twist. It is a hugely ambitious plan, and with Nathan project managing and setting themselves just a year to finish the build, the pressure to pull it off is huge

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics attend a suspected domestic assault and need to treat one man who claims he was punched and knocked unconscious. A rare genetic disease leaves a woman with a dislocated shoulder and in excruciating pain, and a man, who in the past has threatened the emergency services with a weapon, calls for an ambulance

programme.title: Surviving a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Tony Antonucci describes his narrow escape from serial killer John Wayne Gacy, whom he was employed by as an apprentice contractor

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.desc: The chef takes a gastronomic road trip to Istanbul through the countries of the former Byzantine Empire - a melting pot of East and West. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May put three supercars through their paces in Italy. The journey begins at Nardo, a high-speed testing ground so vast it can be seen from space, and includes a nerve-racking drive in Rome before reaching its conclusion with a timed challenge against the Stig at the Imola circuit

Moving into Berkshire, Portillo drops in at a factory manufacturing a famous sleep-inducing beverage with historic roots. Michael's journey ends at Henley-on-Thames in Oxfordshire, where he learns that rowing in an eight is a challenging business

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo enjoys a ukulele lesson in Haddington, East Lothian, birthplace of the Victorian self-improvement guru Samuel Smiles. In Musselburgh, he gets a taste of life as a fishwife, before exploring Edinburgh where a popular 19th-century mode of transport is making a comeback. Michael also visits the Royal College of Surgeons, where he discovers the macabre history of body snatchers and murderers and heads onwards to the University of Edinburgh Medical School, to learn how students use sophisticated technology to study anatomy

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets off from Motherwell as he continues his journey through southern Scotland, celebrating the Victorian iron and steel industry and admires one of its crowning achievements - the Forth Rail Bridge. He then visits the Falls of Clyde, which inspired Wordsworth and Coleridge, heads to Cumbernauld to learn about the origins of one of Scotland's best-selling soft drinks, and in Linlithgow he marvels at the ingenuity of the engineers who built the Union Canal

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo begins this leg of his journey in Stirling, where he visits the scene of the Battle of Bannockburn before travelling north to Crieff in Perth and Kinross to take in a Victorian spa. programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the final leg of his journey across southern Scotland from west to east, beginning by paying homage to the birthplace of golf at St Andrews. In Dunfermline, he learns about the humble origins of a remarkable philanthropist who worked on the railroads before making his fortune in steel, and then crosses the Forth Bridge to end his trip in Edinburgh, where he treads the boards in an unconventional adaptation of a play by Oscar Wilde at the Festival Fringe

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
